items.title: Ups, downs and the race for Europe
items.summary: All you need to know about promotion, relegation and qualification for Europe in England and Scotland's top men's football leagues, and the Women's Super League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dawkins, Northeast thrive as Stokes suffers through the sickness
items.summary: England skipper deepens Crawley gloom but endures tough day at Beckenham
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Patrick Mahomes is back playing golf
items.summary: Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes is "making progress" in his rehab from major knee surgery, coach Andy Reid said Thursday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
